profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings
profile.editable_only: Editable only on the 22nd–23rd of each month (book closing period)
profile.mod_locked: Modification locked. Access period is restricted to dates 22-23 of each month.
profile.closure_desc: Closing your account will permanently terminate all access and cooperative services. All member rights and outstanding obligations will be settled in accordance with applicable cooperative regulations.
profile.closure_summary_desc: Review eligibility, settlement, and closure impact before submitting.
profile.closure_blocked: Closure is blocked until loans and monthly saving bills are settled.
profile.closure_pending_msg: Your account closure request has been submitted and is currently pending review by the administrator.
profile.agree_terms: I have read the consequence and agree to the account closure terms and conditions.
